  margin-bottom: 1cm
  margin-top: 1cm

    showFooter: False
    showHeader: False
    underline: false
  mainPage:
    showFooter: True
    showHeader: True

{
    "image command": {
        "prefix": "ima",
        "description": "insert image",
        "scope": "",
        "body": [
            "| IMAGE | src/${1:filepath} | ${2:scale}, ${3:caption} ${0:_[I]} "
        ]
    },
    "cell (cel}": {
        "prefix": "cel",
        "description": "insert cell label",
        "scope": "",
        "body": [
            "# %% ${0:paste}"
        ]
    },
    "rivtlib ( rvapi )": {
        "prefix": "api",
        "description": "import rivt api",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "import rivtlib.api as rv"
        ]
    },
    "R method { rvr )": {
        "prefix": "rvr",
        "description": "Run method",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "rv.R(\"\"\"${1:run-section} | ${2:color} ${3:none} | ${4:oss} ${0:private} ",
            "",
            "    # run",
            "    ",
            "    \"\"\")"
        ]
    },
    "I method ( rvl )": {
        "prefix": "rvi",
        "description": "Insert method",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "rv.I(\"\"\"${1:insert-section} | ${2:public} ${3:private} | ${4:nocolor} ${0:color} ",
            "    ",
            "    # insert",
            "    ",
            "    \"\"\")"
        ]
    },
    "V method ( rvv )": {
        "prefix": "rvv",
        "description": "Value method",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "rv.V(\"\"\"${1:values-section} | ${2:public} ${3:private} | ${4:nocolor} ${0:color} ",
            "    ",
            "    # values",
            "    ",
            "    \"\"\")",
            ""
        ]
    },
    "T section ( rvt )": {
        "prefix": "rvt",
        "description": "Tools method",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "rv.T(\"\"\"${1:tool-section} | ${2:public} ${3:private} | ${4:nocolor} ${0:color} ",
            "    ",
            "    # import function",
            "    # for i in range(5): print(i)",
            "    ",
            "    \"\"\")"
        ]
    },
    "P section [rvp]": {
        "prefix": "rvp",
        "description": "publish method",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "rv.P(\"\"\"${1:write-settings} | ${2:public} ${3:private} | ${4:nocolor} ${0:color} ",
            "    ",
            "",
            "    ",
            "    \"\"\")"
        ]
    },
    "cmd text ( |x )": {
        "prefix": "|x",
        "description": "insert text from file",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "| text | ${2: filename} | ${1:plain}  ${0:rivt} "
        ]
    },
    "cmd image ( |i )": {
        "prefix": "|i",
        "description": "insert image from file",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "| image | ${3: rel path}, ${2: rel path} | ${1:1,0}, ${0:1.0} "
        ]
    },
    "cmd table [ |t ]": {
        "prefix": "|t",
        "description": "insert table from file",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "| table | ${3:rel-path} | ${2:20}, [${1:0},${0:0}]  "
        ]
    },
    "cmd append [ |a ]": {
        "prefix": "|a",
        "description": "append pdf file",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "| append | ${2: rel-path} | ${1:number}  ${0:nonumber} "
        ]
    },
    "tag figure [ _f }": {
        "prefix": "_f",
        "description": "figure caption",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[f]"
        ]
    },
    "tag equation [ _e }": {
        "prefix": "_e",
        "description": "equation label tag",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[e]"
        ]
    },
    "tag table [ _t ]": {
        "prefix": "_t",
        "description": "table title tag",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[t]"
        ]
    },
    "tag sympy [ _s ]": {
        "prefix": "_s",
        "description": "sympy equation tag",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[s]"
        ]
    },
    "tag center [ _c ]": {
        "prefix": "_c",
        "description": "center line",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[c]"
        ]
    },
    "tag footnote [ _# ]": {
        "prefix": "_#",
        "description": "tag a footnote ",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[#]"
        ]
    },
    "tag footnote description [ _d ]": {
        "prefix": "_d",
        "description": "tag footnote description",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[D]"
        ]
    },
    "tag horizontal line  _[ h ]": {
        "prefix": "_-",
        "description": "insert horizontal line",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[H]"
        ]
    },
    "tag new page [ _n ]": {
        "prefix": "_n",
        "description": "start a new page",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[n]"
        ]
    },
    "tag url [ _u ]": {
        "prefix": "_u",
        "description": "tag url",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[ https://${1: url} ${0: url label} url]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag latex ( _[l )": {
        "prefix": "_[x",
        "description": "tag latex block",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[[l]]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag plain ( _[p )": {
        "prefix": "_[p",
        "description": "tag plain text block",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[[p]]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag bold ( _[b )": {
        "prefix": "_[b",
        "description": "block tag bold",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[[b]]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag italic ( _[i )": {
        "prefix": "_[i",
        "description": "block tag italic",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[[i]]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag center ( _[c )": {
        "prefix": "_[c",
        "description": "block tag center",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "_[[c]]"
        ]
    },
    "block tag quit [ _[q ]": {
        "prefix": "__q",
        "description": "tag block quit",
        "scope": "python",
        "body": [
            "__[[q]]"
        ]
    }
}
